package.name: welding_manual_skill
package.description:
Mock implementation of the "manual parameter adjust" skill. Lifecycle action server triggered by the MANUAL_ADJUST intent (ROBIN dashboard "Manual adjust" button). Mock: 2 s with VALIDATING → APPLYING → CONFIRMING phase feedback. Clamps the requested value to a safe operating range.
ros4hri compliance: conceptually implements process_skills/ManualParameterAdjust.
